title: Optional hosted SPARQL / Neo4j query endpoint
context: A public SPARQL or Neo4j query endpoint would allow programmatic queries against the knowledge graph without requiring users to download the full export. This is only viable if a steward offers to host the infrastructure. It is listed as an optional backlog item; this task should not be started until a steward has committed to host and fund the endpoint.
objective: Implement and deploy a public read-only SPARQL and/or Neo4j Bolt query endpoint backed by the graph exports, with no PII collection, rate limiting, and the research-use disclaimer on the endpoint documentation.
acceptanceCriteria: A named steward has committed to host and fund the endpoint before this task begins.
A public read-only SPARQL or Neo4j Bolt endpoint is deployed and accessible without authentication.
The endpoint serves only the CC0 core graph (or clearly labeled which overlays are included).
Rate limiting is configured to prevent abuse.
Endpoint documentation carries the 'For research and education only - not medical advice' disclaimer.
No visitor PII is collected by the endpoint.
output: deploy/sparql/ or deploy/neo4j/ directory with endpoint configuration and deployment scripts, committed via PR, with a live endpoint URL.
